description: Canonical branch runtime registry. JSON is source of truth. active-branches.md is a generated view.

legacy_bootstrap_repo.notes: Bootstrap repo used before YOS monorepo topology was established. Never use as default runtime. Inspect only as fallback if YOS runtime is inaccessible.

test_branches.notes: Canonical reorganization branch. Contains MPM runtime, KAP backbone, governance. Pending A&G review before merge to main.
